add-png-logo-to-first-page.title: Add PNG Logo to First Page of PDF
add-png-logo-to-first-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, place a PNG logo at specific coordinates on the first page, and save the modified document.

add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages with Opacity
add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent background image on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Transparent PNG Overlay to PDF Pages
add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place a transparent PNG image on each page of a PDF and set its Z‑order so it appears above existing content.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image watermark on every page of a PDF and rotate it 45 degrees for diagonal placement using Aspose.Pdf.

add-company-logo-to-first-page.title: Add Company Logo to First Page of PDF
add-company-logo-to-first-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp for a logo, center it on the first page, and save the modified document.

add-header-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Image to Each PDF Page
add-header-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and place a decorative header image at the top of each page while preserving existing content.

add-decorative-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Decorative Footer Image to PDF Pages
add-decorative-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a footer image on each page of a PDF and scale it proportionally to the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to apply a semi‑transparent background pattern image to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent background pattern image to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-pdf.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages
add-background-image-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, adding a semi‑transparent background image to each page using a BackgroundArtifact, and saving the modified document.

add-background-texture-overlay.title: Add Background Texture Image with Overlay Blend to PDF Pages
add-background-texture-overlay.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent background image to each PDF page and setting its blend mode to overlay using Aspose.PDF.

add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.title: Add Semi-Transparent Overlay Image to PDF
add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent overlay image to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-color-overlay-to-pd.title: Add Semi-Transparent Color Overlay to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-color-overlay-to-pd.description: Demonstrates reading a theme configuration file and applying a semi‑transparent colored overlay to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with configurable opacity, apply it to each page, and save the watermarked document.

replace-image-on-page-three-with-high-re.title: Replace Image on Page Three with High-Resolution PNG
replace-image-on-page-three-with-high-re.description: Shows how to replace an existing JPEG image on the third page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution PNG using Aspose.Pdf's ImagePlacementAbsorber and image replacement APIs.

replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.title: Replace PDF Images with PNG While Preserving Position
replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's image resources, and replaces every image with a specified PNG file, keeping the original layout intact before saving the result.

replace-raster-with-vector-svg.title: Replace Raster Images with Vector SVGs in PDF
replace-raster-with-vector-svg.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, find raster images, replace them with matching SVG vector files, and then optimize the document using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-odd-pages-placeholder.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with Placeholder
replace-images-odd-pages-placeholder.description: Shows how to iterate over odd‑numbered pages of a PDF and replace every image with a placeholder graphic while preserving the original image dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-odd-pages-qr-placeholder.title: Replace Images on Odd Pages with QR Placeholder
replace-images-odd-pages-qr-placeholder.description: Shows how to replace every image on odd-numbered PDF pages with a QR code placeholder using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-even-pdf-pages-to-grayscale.title: Convert Even PDF Pages to Grayscale
convert-even-pdf-pages-to-grayscale.description: Shows how to load a PDF, turn only the even-numbered pages into grayscale, and save the modified document.

replace-images-last-page-with-banner.title: Replace Images on Last PDF Page with Full-Width Banner
replace-images-last-page-with-banner.description: Demonstrates how to hide all existing images on the last page of a PDF and insert a single banner image that spans the entire page width using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-large-images-in-pdf.title: Compress Large Images in PDF
compress-large-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to replace images exceeding 1 MB with compressed JPEG versions by configuring Aspose.Pdf optimization and image compression options.

replace-pdf-images-with-hyperlink-placeh.title: Replace PDF Images with Hyperlink Placeholders
replace-pdf-images-with-hyperlink-placeh.description: Shows how to hide each image in a PDF and add a transparent hyperlink annotation that points to the original image URL, effectively creating a placeholder for the image.

convert-pdf-images-to-monochrome.title: Convert PDF Images to Monochrome
convert-pdf-images-to-monochrome.description: Shows how to replace each image in a PDF with a grayscale version using Aspose.Pdf, resulting in a uniform monochrome document.

correct-exif-orientation-in-pdf.title: Correct EXIF Orientation of Images in PDF
correct-exif-orientation-in-pdf.description: Shows how to read EXIF orientation from images embedded in a PDF, rotate them accordingly, and replace the original images using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-large-images-in-pdf__v2.title: Compress Large Images in PDF
compress-large-images-in-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates iterating through PDF pages, detecting images larger than 2 MB, and replacing them with compressed JPEG versions using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-images-with-qr-code-placehol.title: Replace PDF Images with QR Code Placeholders
replace-pdf-images-with-qr-code-placehol.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, replace each embedded image with a QR‑code placeholder, and set alternative text that references the original image.

replace-images-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Images on a PDF Page
replace-images-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace selected images on a specific PDF page by mapping original image indices to new image files using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-images-with-icc-profiles.title: Replace PDF Images with ICC‑Profile Versions
replace-pdf-images-with-icc-profiles.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate image resources, and replace them with versions that contain embedded ICC profiles for proper color management.

replace-images-with-logo.title: Replace Images on PDF Pages with a New Logo
replace-images-with-logo.description: Demonstrates how to locate all image placements on each PDF page using ImagePlacementAbsorber and replace them with a specified logo image.

replace-title-page-banner.title: Replace Title Page Image with High‑Resolution Banner
replace-title-page-banner.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the first page's image collection, and replace an existing image with a high‑resolution banner using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-index-page-images-with-banner.title: Replace Index Page Images with Banner Image
replace-index-page-images-with-banner.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the first page's image resources, and replace all existing images with a single banner JPEG using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-appendix-images-with-placeholder.title: Replace Appendix Images with Placeholder in PDF
replace-appendix-images-with-placeholder.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over the appendix pages of a PDF and replace every image with a single placeholder image to protect confidential content.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page of a PDF and delete all embedded images using Aspose.Pdf, then save the cleaned document.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete images with a DPI lower than 72 from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImagePlacementAbsorber and hide the low‑resolution placements.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf__v.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf__v.description: Shows how to scan each page of a PDF, use ImagePlacementAbsorber to find images, and delete those with a horizontal or vertical DPI lower than 72.

remove-duplicate-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Images from PDF by Comparing Raw Bytes
remove-duplicate-images-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, computes a SHA‑256 hash for each image's raw bytes, removes duplicate images across pages, and optimizes the document.

collect-image-resolution-metadata.title: Collect Image Resolution Metadata from PDF Pages
collect-image-resolution-metadata.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all image placements on each page, and reports each image's visible size and DPI resolution for reporting purposes.

resize-images-on-pdf-pages.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages to Half Size
resize-images-on-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to locate each image on every PDF page, scale it to 50% of its original dimensions, and replace the original image in the document before saving.

resize-pdf-images-using-configurable-sca.title: Resize PDF Images Using Configurable Scale Factor
resize-pdf-images-using-configurable-sca.description: Demonstrates how to read a scaling factor from a configuration file and resize all images in a PDF by that factor using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-images-in-pdf-using-configurable-.title: Resize Images in PDF Using Configurable Scale Factor
resize-images-in-pdf-using-configurable-.description: Loads a scaling factor from an appsettings.json file and applies it to every image in a PDF, then saves the modified document.

resize-pdf-page-images-using-json-config.title: Resize PDF Page Images Using JSON Configuration
resize-pdf-page-images-using-json-config.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON file that maps page numbers to target dimensions, extract each image on those pages, resize it with System.Drawing, and replace the original image in the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-raster-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Raster Image to PDF Page
add-raster-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates creating an in‑memory PNG raster image and inserting it onto a new PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Image class and the page's Paragraphs collection.

insert-raster-image-into-pdf-at-absolute.title: Insert Raster Image into PDF at Absolute Coordinates
insert-raster-image-into-pdf-at-absolute.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, define a rectangle with absolute coordinates, and insert a raster image onto a page using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-embedded-raster-image.title: Resize Embedded Raster Image in PDF
resize-embedded-raster-image.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate raster Image objects on each page, set their width and height, and save the modified document.

replace-image-on-pdf-page.title: Replace an Image on a PDF Page
replace-image-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image in a PDF page with a new image loaded from a file stream using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-raster-image-reference-from-pdf-p.title: Delete Raster Image Reference from PDF Page
delete-raster-image-reference-from-pdf-p.description: Shows how to remove a specific raster image reference from a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the image object in the resources collection.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-raster-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each raster image as an individual PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf-preserving-origi.title: Extract Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
extract-images-from-pdf-preserving-origi.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, extract each raster image, determine its original format, and save it to disk without conversion.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDF Files
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, extract each embedded image from every page using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images as PNG files to a designated output directory.

add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.title: Add DICOM Image to PDF Using FileStream
add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.description: Demonstrates loading a DICOM medical image via a FileStream and inserting it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.title: Insert DICOM Image with Custom Size into PDF
insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.description: Demonstrates how to load a DICOM file, set its width, height, and resolution handling, and embed it into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

render-pdf-page-to-png-fallback-font.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with Fallback Font
render-pdf-page-to-png-fallback-font.description: Demonstrates how to render the first page of a PDF document to a PNG image while specifying a fallback font using Aspose.Pdf rendering options.

render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-fo.title: Render PDF Pages to JPEG with Default Font Fallback
render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-fo.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF into JPEG images while specifying a default font for missing glyphs, and creates a sample PDF if the input file is absent.

generate-pdf-page-thumbnails.title: Generate PDF Page Thumbnails as PNG
generate-pdf-page-thumbnails.description: Creates a 150x200 PNG thumbnail for each page of a PDF document and saves them to a specified folder using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-with-default-fo.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Default Font Arial
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-with-default-fo.description: Shows how to render each page of a PDF to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf while setting RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName to "Arial" for consistent font substitution.

render-pdf-to-tiff-lzw-font-fallback.title: Render PDF to TIFF with LZW Compression and Font Fallback
render-pdf-to-tiff-lzw-font-fallback.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to a multi‑page TIFF using LZW compression while applying a default font fallback for missing characters.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.title: Export PDF Pages to BMP Images at 300 DPI
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document into a BMP image with 300 DPI resolution using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice and rendering options.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with Default Font
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates converting an entire PDF document to a multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf while specifying a default font for rendering missing glyphs.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page as SVG
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect vector graphic elements from a specific PDF page and convert them into a single SVG file for further manipulation.

move-vector-graphic-to-new-position.title: Move Vector Graphic to New Position in PDF
move-vector-graphic-to-new-position.description: Demonstrates how to extract a vector graphic from a PDF page, change its coordinates by updating its Matrix via the Position property, and place it back on the same page.

transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.title: Transfer Vector Graphic Between PDF Pages
transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract a vector graphic from one PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and place it on another page with a new position.

remove-vector-graphic-from-pdf-page.title: Remove a Vector Graphic from a PDF Page
remove-vector-graphic-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to locate vector graphics on a PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and delete a specific graphic element, then save the modified document.

extract-vector-graphics-to-pdf.title: Extract Vector Graphics and Insert into PDF Page
extract-vector-graphics-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract vector graphic elements from a source PDF using GraphicsAbsorber, save them as SVG files, and insert each SVG as an image into the Paragraphs collection of a new PDF page.

copy-first-page-to-new-pdf.title: Copy First Page to a New PDF Document
copy-first-page-to-new-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, copy its first page into a new document using the Add method, and save the resulting PDF.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files, create per‑file and per‑page folders, and use Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor to extract all vector graphics as SVG files.

set-alternative-text-for-pdf-images.title: Set Alternative Text for Images in PDF
set-alternative-text-for-pdf-images.description: Demonstrates how to add alternative (alt) text to each image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to improve accessibility for screen readers.

retrieve-alt-text-from-pdf-images.title: Retrieve Alternative Text from PDF Images
retrieve-alt-text-from-pdf-images.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages and images, extracting each image's alternative (alt) text, and logging the results.

assign-alt-text-to-embedded-image.title: Assign Alternative Text to an Embedded Image in PDF
assign-alt-text-to-embedded-image.description: Demonstrates how to embed an image into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and assign alternative text for accessibility purposes.

render-pdf-pages-to-png-300-dpi.title: Render PDF Pages to PNG at 300 DPI
render-pdf-pages-to-png-300-dpi.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set a 300 DPI resolution, and convert each page to a PNG image saved to a specified folder.

convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images with Custom Default Font
convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.description: The example loads a PDF document, sets RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName to "Times New Roman" to handle missing fonts, and converts each page to a 300 DPI PNG image.

rasterize-vector-graphics-in-pdf.title: Rasterize Vector Graphics in PDF
rasterize-vector-graphics-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to replace vector graphics on a PDF page with a raster image by using the FlattenTransparency method, while keeping the original layout intact.
